REQUIREMENTS

NOTICE OF ADDENDUM: Requirements for this program were updated effective Spring 2026 and have been published on ADDENDA TO THIS CATALOG (https://academiccatalog.umd.edu/undergraduate/ addenda/#latin_american_caribbean_studies).

The undergraduate minor in Latin American and Caribbean Studies will be awarded to students who have completed 15 credits with a cumulative GPA of 2.0 or better in the following areas:
